data.body: User authorized (mid-session): flip convergence floors ON BY DEFAULT and land on main, + open task to remove flags. Executed: ticket 70c8-423e-e4c1-4d86 (5 plan-review rounds to signed PASS — itself a live demo of the friction; triage comment justifies 3 residual advisories), claimed, worktree convergence-default-on, defaults flipped in _config_schema.py + full stale-framing sweep (12 files), commit 0a6bea0. Two pre-existing env test failures confirmed on pristine main (resolve_symbol suite-order flake; log_degrade store-write leak -> filed bug d9aa-1b5b-4c64-4267). Follow-up flag-removal task 49ae-258b-4534-4d83 (blocked on 70c8). Next: gates green -> push gerrit refs/for/main -> votes -> submit.
